mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM t_tag WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND tag_name IN
#{name}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_tag (tag_name, tag_category, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{tag.tagName}, #{tag.tagCategory}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tag_category = VALUES(tag_category), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.tag_name, t.tag_category, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.is_deleted FROM t_tag t LEFT JOIN t_meeting m ON m.status IN (2, 3, 4) AND (m.is_deleted = 0 OR m.is_deleted IS NULL) AND m.tags IS NOT NULL AND m.tags != '' AND CONCAT(',', m.tags, ',') LIKE CONCAT('%,', t.id, ',%') WHERE (t.is_deleted = 0 OR t.is_deleted IS NULL) GROUP BY t.id, t.tag_name, t.tag_category, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.is_deleted ORDER BY COUNT(m.id) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
